required_change: Replace the legacy module overview with the seven-authoritative-appendix architecture; document theorem-complex traceability, exact/proxy status, regeneration commands, and artifact retention policy.
acceptance_criteria: Every appendix module and theorem registry command is documented; generated vs tracked artifacts policy is internally consistent.

required_change: Fix zero-argument forwarding bugs; accept typed inputs; expose Flowpoint, closure, DFI/pDFI, Elastic-pi/Norm, gravity, completeness, QENN, PGQENN and SOInets through a stable facade; return typed result/status objects.
acceptance_criteria: All facade methods call underlying APIs with valid signatures and have contract tests.

required_change: Define package metadata, Python version, pytest, Ruff, mypy and coverage settings; declare package discovery.
acceptance_criteria: Editable install succeeds and all test/tool commands run from repository root.

required_change: Keep numerical stack, pin compatible lower bounds, and move optional AI/interactive dependencies to separate files.
acceptance_criteria: Fresh core environment installs without unnecessary deep-learning/GUI dependencies.

required_change: Add hypothesis, pytest-cov, pytest-xdist, ruff and mypy.
acceptance_criteria: Property tests, coverage and static checks run in CI.

required_change: Add PyTorch and optional graph/spectral dependencies required by QENN, PGQENN and SOInets.
acceptance_criteria: AI tests train deterministic tiny models on CPU.

required_change: Add deterministic seeds, artifact temp directories, numeric tolerances, and theorem-complex fixtures while preserving Agg backend.
acceptance_criteria: Tests are side-effect-free unless explicitly marked artifact.

required_change: Run core, theorem-contract, artifact-smoke and AI CPU tests; upload compact manifests on failure.
acceptance_criteria: CI gates merge on contract tests and reproducibility checks.

required_change: Add theorem ID, source-law hash, parameter hash, RNG seed, code commit, residual vector, status and claim-boundary fields.
acceptance_criteria: Every generated CSV/JSON/NPZ/figure has a machine-readable manifest.

required_change: Use theorem-aware manifests; save frame sampling, codec/fps, data checksum and reproducibility command.
acceptance_criteria: Animations can be regenerated from compact data and manifest.

required_change: Export typed theorem-complex runtime primitives.
acceptance_criteria: All appendix modules use one shared runtime.

required_change: Define ComplexId, SourceLaw, DomainSpec, ResidualVector, ClosureStatus, SimulationResult and ArtifactManifest.
acceptance_criteria: No module returns untyped ad-hoc dictionaries for theorem results.

required_change: Register all 351 theorem complexes and bind labels to implementation, tests, simulations and artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: Registry reports 351/351 entries and fails on duplicate/missing IDs.

required_change: Implement involution, projections, source-removal, non-cancelling additive energy, coercivity, observability and boundary leakage helpers.
acceptance_criteria: Shared invariant tests pass across scalar, vector, matrix and graph domains.

required_change: Implement domain guards, finite checks, residual tolerances, counterexample witnesses and fail-closed statuses.
acceptance_criteria: No silent NaN/Inf coercion is permitted.

required_change: CLI/API to execute one complex, one part, one appendix or all 351 and write manifests.
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic full audit command produces a consolidated status report.

required_change: Human-readable appendix-label-to-code/test/artifact map.
acceptance_criteria: Generated from registry and matches CSV matrix.

required_change: State exact source laws, numerical approximations, clipping policy, claim boundaries and known gaps.
acceptance_criteria: No proxy result is described as theorem proof or empirical validation.

required_change: Replace XOR presentation as computational mechanism with a typed involution/operator API; add spectral projectors, schedule/history encoder, phase-indexed kernel transport and affine history field; retain fp() compatibility wrapper.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Split unit/property tests from plot generation; remove plt.show from tests; add F^2=I, projector, decoder, source-removal and affine gauge tests.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Add reciprocal relation/action groupoid, C2-action/free-cofree reconstruction, invariant/anti-invariant orbit-field APIs; keep legacy duality_equation wrapper.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Implement exact symmetry/group-action contracts and revised B/C additive closures; stop reducing non-integer floats to Boolean 1/-1 proxies.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Implement typed spatial carrier, affine/coordinate transforms, boundary and closure residuals.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Replace legacy generator/product logic as canonical definition with the revised countable-infinity complexes and explicit finite approximants.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Implement measure/topology/cardinality proxies only under declared finite approximations; add obstruction/failure statuses.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Add normalization contracts, DFI handoff, measurable-decomposition, Lp, factor-map, addressability and spatial closures.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Implement observation instrument, collapse projections, attractor/uniqueness, temporal compression, locality/horizon and spectral outcome closures.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Align arithmetic/algebraic typed partial operations with orientation grading and source-law residuals.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Align phase/harmonic coordinates and reconstruction errors with analytic/geometric B/C closures.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Preserve non-finite/divergence information as explicit residual/status instead of silently replacing with 0/1; implement all DFI A/B/C contracts.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Enforce K_D>0; expose log-domain exact field, clipping metadata and norm/coercivity residuals; do not silently equate clipped values with exact source law.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Keep ratio law but add eight B operators, four C closures, typed residuals and source-removal tests.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Expose the six revised B invariants and three C closures as public APIs rather than only toy-model facade.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Separate source law, solver, diagnostics and artifact generation; add refinement, conservation and ablation tests.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Add revised horizon translation, regular hypersurface, Hawking flux density, accessible memory and residual lower-bound operators; preserve proxy boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Add revised wave-energy, harmonic, DFI-memory, shock/tilt, tomography and C-level reconstruction operators.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Bind all 15 revised complexes and corrected type/domain obligations to typed model objects and residuals.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Add theorem-ID scenarios for 9A→4B→2C, source-removal and terminal quotient cases.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Align Gödel boundary simulation with declared scope and first-order completion terminology.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Add exact corrected decoder, attainment, descent, transgression and terminal factorization tests.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Remove duplicated local Flowpoint/DFI/ElasticPi logic and random PGQENN graph growth as canonical behavior; convert to compatibility wrapper over new typed AI package.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Split analytics from model code, remove hard-coded output paths, and delegate plotting to theorem-aware artifact pipeline.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Convert script-style test to deterministic pytest benchmark with train/validation/test split, baselines, ablations and manifests.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.

required_change: Convert to deterministic benchmark; separate generated WAV examples from unit tests and add robustness/calibration metrics.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant theorem-complex registry entries resolve to this module and contract tests pass.
